prompt: Generate a screenshot of a bakery website landing page displayed on a tablet, utilizing the warm golden brown color palette inspired by the bread in the reference image for its design elements.
prompt_refined: Generate a screenshot of a bakery website landing page, displayed clearly on a tablet. The website's user interface and design elements, including backgrounds, buttons, banners, and decorative accents, should prominently utilize a warm golden-brown color palette. This palette should specifically derive its varying hues, rich undertones, and a subtle, baked-like sheen from the glossy crust and perfectly scored surfaces of the bread loaves visible in image 1.
objects: Screenshot of a bakery website landing page
Website background with warm golden-brown hues
Website buttons with warm golden-brown hues
Website banners with warm golden-brown hues
Website decorative accents with warm golden-brown hues
